gist.headline: Idol Interaction joins the hive
gist.blurb: A new community game just dropped! 'Idol Interaction' uses Pollinations models to let you scout characters, chat, complete tasks, and take photos.
gist.summary: Added 'idol-interaction' to the community games showcase, a new app that uses Pollinations models for character generation and chat.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and play a new community-built game where they scout, chat with, and photograph AI-generated characters.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a photographer or fan for a cute pixel-art idol character. Represents the 'idol-interaction' game where users scout and take photos of characters.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny photographer's hat, holding a small camera and taking a picture of a cute pixel-art pop idol character on a small wooden stage. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel pink gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
